description: Canonical multi-agent coordination patterns for OpenClaw.

deterministic_router.description: Classify the task with structured fields and route to a single specialist flow.
use_when: one specialist can complete the work
deterministic_router.context_policy: pass only task summary, artifacts, blockers, and route snapshot

orchestrator_worker.description: Lead agent decomposes a task, delegates bounded subtasks, and synthesizes outputs.
use_when: multiple tools or domains are involved
orchestrator_worker.context_policy: workers receive scoped briefs and artifacts, never full raw history
orchestrator_worker.stop_condition: aggregator synthesizes worker artifacts into the target contract

parallel_fanout.description: Run several independent workers in parallel and merge their outputs.
parallel_fanout.context_policy: same prompt family, distinct scopes per worker
parallel_fanout.stop_condition: all workers complete or quorum threshold is met

reviewer_refiner.description: Generate, evaluate against acceptance checks, refine once or twice, then release.
reviewer_refiner.context_policy: reviewer sees output plus acceptance checks, not all tool chatter

approval_checkpoint.description: Pause a task at an approval boundary and resume with the same session context.
approval_checkpoint.context_policy: preserve route snapshot, user intent, and decision history

background_digest.description: Convert noisy internal state into a short, human-friendly digest.
use_when: the user does not want technical detail
background_digest.context_policy: consume only execution_state JSON and approved internal reports
background_digest.stop_condition: digest satisfies output contract line limits

remote_a2a_delegate.description: Delegate to a remote agent using an A2A-compatible task envelope.
use_when: task can be represented as stateful artifacts
remote_a2a_delegate.context_policy: send minimal task envelope plus approved artifacts only
remote_a2a_delegate.stop_condition: remote task reaches terminal state and artifact is imported
